title: Proposed notice for 1 CCR 207-3
agency: Division of Gaming - Rules promulgated by Gaming Commission
summary: The proposed Rule changes include a change to the licensing fees for Fantasy Contest Operators. We were not able to get the required letter to the General Assembly served in a timely manner so we are cancelling this Rulemaking and will file a new one when we are sure that the letter to the GA has been served.
source_evidence: Department of Revenue Division of Gaming - Rules promulgated by Gaming Commission 1 CCR 207-3 2023-00583 09/07/2023 The proposed Rule changes include a change to the licensing fees for Fantasy Contest Operators. We were not able to get the required letter to the General Assembly served in a timely manner so we are cancelling this Rulemaking and will file a new one when we are sure that the letter to the GA has been served.
